summary.zh: 今日重点关注可验证、可迁移的技能工作流。
summary.en: Today focuses on verifiable and portable skill workflows.

conclusion.zh: 优先采用经过审计的小型技能，不要整包盲装。
conclusion.en: Prefer small audited skills over blind full-package installs.

zh.oneLiner: 把重复的代码审查步骤固化为可验证工作流。
zh.whyNow: 近期增加了测试样例和明确的停止条件。
zh.bestFor: 希望统一代理代码审查流程的团队。
zh.action: 先抽取审查流程并在一个仓库中验证。
zh.primaryCaution: 安装前需要审查附带脚本和权限。
zh.problem: 减少代理跳过测试或安全检查的情况。
zh.usability: 指令可以直接阅读，脚本需要按项目适配。
zh.adaptation: 将工具名替换为Codex现有能力并保留验收门。
zh.trust: 固定commit，逐个审查脚本，不授予不必要权限。

en.oneLiner: Turns repeated code-review steps into a verifiable workflow.
en.whyNow: Recent updates added fixtures and explicit stop conditions.
en.action: Extract the review flow and validate it in one repository first.
en.primaryCaution: Review bundled scripts and permissions before installation.
en.problem: Reduces skipped tests and security checks during agent reviews.
en.usability: Instructions are directly readable; scripts need project adaptation.
en.adaptation: Map tool names to Codex capabilities and retain acceptance gates.
en.trust: Pin a commit, audit scripts individually, and minimize permissions.
